title: Largest (148 files); replay_overlay/ pinned to HEAD 039f2cd...; deterministic replay
public_claim: Largest (148 files); replay_overlay/ pinned to HEAD 039f2cd...; deterministic replay is a preserved project packet for the largest package in the Red Team cluster (148 files, 2.9 MB uncompressed) and the only one whose unique contribution is a deterministic replay overlay pinned to repo HEAD 039f2cd23ed91f8a7e59b0aa4ef9a8cac19b321d.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves adversarial review machinery: assumptions, vulnerabilities, rival interpretations, replay evidence, and acceptance gates can be inspected before a claim advances.
